channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Trump fires the entire National Science Board
item.description: Multiple sources are reporting that the Trump administration has dismissed the entire National Science Board (NSB). The NSB advises the president and Congress on the National Science Foundation (NSF), which has already been funding research at historically low levels and has seen significant delays in doling out that funding. The NSF has been fundamental in […]...

item.title: I'm still playing Forza Horizon 3 a decade after release — here's why I can't get enough of its beautiful world
item.description: For our From the Backlog series, I'm revisiting the brilliant open world of Forza Horizon 3.

item.title: An influx of used EVs could drive down prices
item.description: Part of what has held back electric cars has been the cost. But an influx of used vehicles over the next three years could bring prices down dramatically. In 2025, just 123,000 leases on EVs expired. That is expected to more than double to 300,000 in 2026, and double again to 600,000 in 2027 and […]

item.title: For easy CMS installation, here's a free option to consider — Concrete CMS is an impressive, open-source solution for your business
item.description: With Concrete CMS, you can get a free CMS solution online in just a few steps.

item.title: ‘We’re by far the most ubiquitous experience for music’: Spotify’s Head of Consumer Experience talks to me about the streaming giant's next 20 years, including its plans to expand to new formats and combat AI music
item.description: As Spotify celebrates its 20th anniversary, I spoke with Sten Garmark about the platform's exciting future developments.
